name: The Nexus of Echoes  -  Central Chamber
description: A vast circular chamber of polished obsidian. Six archways radiate outward, each shimmering with a different colored light. The ceiling is lost in darkness above, but faint stars seem to drift there.
ambient_1: Polished obsidian reflects shimmering lights from six radiant archways.
ambient_2: Soft blue light pulses gently from the healer’s sanctum to the southeast.
ambient_3: Combat sounds echo faintly from the training hall entrance to the southwest.
ambient_4: Neon advertisements flicker and buzz near the southern archway.

name: Gateway Chamber  -  North
description: The northern archway pulses with golden light. Beyond it, you glimpse rolling green hills and castle spires. A sign reads: 'The Shattered Crown  -  Realm of Sword and Sorcery.'
ambient_1: Golden light pulses warmly from the archway to the south and west.
ambient_2: Rolling green hills and castle spires glow softly beyond the northern archway.
ambient_3: Snow whips sharply through the narrow mountain pass to the north above.
ambient_4: A faint saxophone drifts from the rainy eastern archway to the southeast.

name: Gateway Chamber  -  South
description: The southern archway crackles with blue-white electricity. Neon signs and holographic advertisements flicker beyond. A sign reads: 'Neon Grid  -  The Digital Frontier.'
ambient_1: Blue-white electricity crackles along the southern archway.
ambient_2: Neon signs flicker, casting sharp colors on nearby walls.
ambient_3: Soft blue light spills faintly from the eastern domed room.
ambient_4: The scent of rain mixes with distant saxophone melodies.

name: Gateway Chamber  -  East
description: The eastern archway drips with perpetual rain. Street lamps and saxophone music drift through. A sign reads: 'Midnight Rain  -  Where Shadows Have Secrets.'
ambient_1: Raindrops patter continuously on the eastern archway’s glistening surface.
ambient_2: Saxophone melodies drift softly through the midnight rain to the west.
ambient_3: Soft blue light glows warmly from the healer's sanctum just to the south.
ambient_4: Neon signs flicker and crackle faintly from the southern archway nearby.

name: Gateway Chamber  -  West
description: The western archway glows with orange firelight. Explosions and gunfire echo faintly. A sign reads: 'Blood & Chrome  -  No Pain, No Gain.'
ambient_1: Orange firelight flickers and gunfire echoes faintly from the western archway.
ambient_2: Explosions and hammering ring out from the armorer's workshop to the southwest.
ambient_3: Electric crackles and neon glow pulse from the southern archway nearby.
ambient_4: The cork board’s worn surface smells faintly of paper and dust to the north.

name: Gateway Chamber  -  Upper
description: The upper archway opens onto a staircase that climbs into starlight. Floating islands are visible in the distance. A sign reads: 'Ethereal Drift  -  Between the Stars.'
ambient_1: Starlight spills down the staircase, revealing distant floating isles.
ambient_2: The pale archway to the west reflects ghostly lights drifting upward.
ambient_3: Golden light pulses softly from the northern archway to the south.
ambient_4: Scenes flicker rapidly through the shimmering portal to the southeast.

name: Gateway Chamber  -  Northeast
description: A shimmering portal shows scenes from different time periods flickering rapidly. A sign reads: 'Forgotten Epoch  -  History Unbound.'
ambient_1: Scenes flicker rapidly through the shimmering portal that shimmers nearby.
ambient_2: Raindrops patter softly on the eastern archway to the south.
ambient_3: Faint golden light pulses from the northern archway to the west.
ambient_4: Soft ticking and clacking of clocks echo from the chamber above.

name: The Bazaar  -  West Wing
description: A bustling marketplace fills this wide corridor. Merchants hawk wares from a dozen different worlds. The smell of exotic spices mixes with machine oil.
ambient_1: The air mixes with exotic spices and the sour scent of machine oil.
ambient_2: Hammer strikes ring out from the forge at the armorer's workshop to the south.
ambient_3: Orange firelight glows softly from the western archway to the east.
ambient_4: The bustle of merchants and bartering fills the crowded corridor with life.

name: The Bazaar  -  East Wing
description: More market stalls line this corridor. A weapons dealer polishes a gleaming blade while a tech vendor demonstrates holographic displays.
ambient_1: The glass dome above reveals stars drifting silently in the void.
ambient_2: A gentle rain patters softly on the eastern archway nearby.
ambient_3: Faint saxophone music floats through the air from the west.
ambient_4: Holographic displays flicker faintly beside polished blades.

name: Training Hall  -  Entrance
description: A reinforced doorway leads into a large open space. The sounds of combat echo from within. A sign reads: 'All skill levels welcome. No killing.' A deep, perfectly round groove has been scored into the stone floor, as if something heavy and spherical rolled through here at tremendous speed. Chips of ancient masonry litter the path it carved.
ambient_1: Echoes of combat ripple faintly through the reinforced doorway.
ambient_2: The smoky clang of hammer strikes drifts in from the west.
ambient_3: Orange firelight glows softly beyond the northern archway.
ambient_4: A heavy grate below hints at darkness and damp stone beneath.

name: The Healer's Sanctum
description: Soft blue light fills this domed room. Crystal formations pulse with restorative energy. A robed figure tends to the wounded.
ambient_1: Soft blue light pulses gently from crystal formations nearby.
ambient_2: Faint murmurs of healing blend with distant market sounds.
ambient_3: Electric crackles hum softly from the western archway.
ambient_4: Perfect silence beckons from the southeast meditation room.

name: The Bulletin Board
description: A large cork board dominates the wall here, covered in notices, bounties, and requests. Adventurers gather to read the latest postings.
ambient_1: The cork board smells of aged paper and faintly spicy ink nearby.
ambient_2: Ghostly lights float upward through the pale archway just to the north.
ambient_3: Orange firelight flickers from the western archway to the south.
ambient_4: Distant echoes of gunfire mix with murmurs from the bustling bazaar southwest.

name: The Undercity Entrance
description: A heavy iron grate in the floor has been pried open. A ladder descends into darkness. The smell of damp stone and worse things rises from below.
ambient_1: A heavy iron grate yawns open, revealing darkness below.
ambient_2: Damp stone smells rise faintly from the depths beneath.
ambient_3: Neon advertisements flicker with sharp blue-white sparks above.
ambient_4: Crystal light pulses softly from the domed room to the northeast.

name: Armorer's Workshop
description: The ring of hammer on anvil fills this smoky room. A stocky smith works at a forge that burns with supernatural heat.
ambient_1: The steady ring of hammer on anvil fills the smoky air.
ambient_2: A forge burns with unnatural heat, casting flickering shadows.
ambient_3: Distant market voices mingle with the metallic scent of iron.
ambient_4: Torchlight flickers quietly along the southwestern corridor.

name: The Observatory
description: A glass dome reveals the void between realms. Stars and distant worlds drift past. Telescopes of various designs point in every direction.
ambient_1: Stars drift silently past the glass dome, distant and cold beyond sight.
ambient_2: Flickering scenes shimmer through the portal to the west with muted light.
ambient_3: Saxophone music drifts faintly from the rainy eastern archway to the southwest.
ambient_4: The hum of distant combat echoes softly from the training grounds below.

name: The Afterlife Gate
description: A pale archway stands here, its surface like still water. Beyond it, ghostly lights drift upward. A sign reads: 'The Afterlife  -  For the Worthy and the Dead.'
ambient_1: The archway's surface ripples like still water in a silent breath.
ambient_2: Ghostly lights rise beyond the pale gate, drifting slow and cold.
ambient_3: A robed figure checks a long list behind the golden gates above.
ambient_4: Faint echoes of golden light pulse from the northern archway nearby.

name: Nexus  -  Southwest Corridor
description: A quiet corridor connecting the training areas to the lower levels. Torches flicker in iron sconces.
ambient_1: Torches flicker gently against iron sconces along the walls.
ambient_2: The smoky clang of hammer rings faintly from the northwest.
ambient_3: Electric crackles hum quietly from the northeastern archway.
ambient_4: Dust motes drift lazily in shafts of muted corridor light.

name: Nexus  -  Southeast Corridor
description: A corridor lined with memorial plaques. Names of fallen heroes are etched in silver.
ambient_1: Silver plaques gleam quietly in the soft corridor light.
ambient_2: Soft blue pulses from crystals drift faintly to the north.
ambient_3: Black still water ripples faintly in the southern well.
ambient_4: Electric crackles shimmer from the northwest gateway arch.

name: Nexus  -  Upper East
description: A balcony overlooks the central chamber from above. The view is dizzying.
ambient_1: The dizzying view plunges beyond the balcony's edge to the northwest.
ambient_2: Golden light pulses faintly from the northern archway to the southwest.
ambient_3: Raindrops patter softly on the eastern archway a short distance south.
ambient_4: Stars drift quietly past the glass dome of the observatory to the southeast.

name: The Pinnacle
description: The highest point of the Nexus. A single chair faces outward into the void between worlds. Someone left a half-finished drink here.
ambient_1: The half-finished drink catches a faint glow under the empty sky.
ambient_2: Ghostly lights drift upward through the pale archway to the southwest.
ambient_3: Floating islands shimmer distantly beyond the staircase to the south.
ambient_4: The dizzying void yawns wide beyond the balcony to the southeast.

name: Storage Cellar
description: Crates and barrels are stacked against the walls. Most are labeled with destinations that no longer exist.
ambient_1: Dusty crates tower silently, bearing names of lost destinations.
ambient_2: The distant ring of hammer echoes faintly from above.
ambient_3: Torch flames flicker softly through the quiet connecting corridor.
ambient_4: Faint sounds of combat drift from the reinforced doorway.

name: The Quiet Room
description: A small meditation chamber. The walls absorb all sound. Perfect silence.
ambient_1: Perfect silence embraces this small, sound-absorbing chamber.
ambient_2: Soft blue light pulses faintly from the nearby domed room.
ambient_3: Black water ripples silently in the well to the southwest.

name: Nexus  -  Deep Basement
description: Below the main level. The walls here are older  -  rougher stone, no polish. Something was here before the Nexus was built.
ambient_1: Rough stone walls close in beneath the polished upper halls.
ambient_2: Black water ripples faintly in the well to the east.
ambient_3: Dust and silence fill the forgotten rooms to the west.
ambient_4: Torch flames flicker softly from corridors high above.

name: Forgotten Storeroom
description: Dust covers everything. Crates marked with symbols no one remembers. A rat watches you from atop a barrel.
ambient_1: Dust thickly coats forgotten crates and aged barrels.
ambient_2: A rat watches silently from atop a cracked wooden barrel.
ambient_3: Torchlight flickers dimly through the quiet connecting corridor.
ambient_4: Damp, musty air seeps in from the nearby dark undercity.

name: The Old Well
description: A stone well sits in the center of this room. The water is black and still. Sometimes it ripples when nothing has touched it.
ambient_1: The water in the well is black and still, reflecting faint shadows.
ambient_2: A heavy iron grate nearby smells of damp earth and rusted iron.
ambient_3: The silence here is deep, broken only by occasional unseen ripples.
ambient_4: From the southeast, faint echoes bounce off cold stone memorial plaques.

name: Training Tower  -  Ground Floor
description:
A wide stone chamber lit by torches. A weathered sign reads:

  'Welcome, newcomer. This tower will teach you to survive.'
  'Type ATTACK to fight. Type FLEE to escape. Type LOOK to observe.'

A straw training dummy stands in the corner. Stairs lead up.
ambient_1: Torches flicker against the cold stone walls.
ambient_2: A straw mat lies worn and flattened nearby.
ambient_3: Sounds of combat echo faintly from below.

name: Training Tower  -  Second Floor
description:
The room is slightly darker. Scratching sounds come from the shadows.

  Tip: After defeating an enemy, check your STATUS to see your power grow.
  Type STATUS to view your stats.
ambient_1: Shadows twist in the dim light above the ground floor.
ambient_2: Soft scratching sounds ripple from the darker corners.
ambient_3: The air here feels cooler than the chamber below.

name: Training Tower  -  Third Floor
description:
Cobwebs stretch across the ceiling. Something skitters above.

  Tip: You can TAKE items from rooms and USE consumables to heal.
  Type INVENTORY to see what you're carrying.
ambient_1: Cobwebs cling thickly to the ceiling overhead.
ambient_2: Something skitters silently just above the ceiling beams.
ambient_3: The faint scent of dust and old stone lingers here.

name: Training Tower  -  Fourth Floor
description:
A small armory. Weapon racks line the walls, mostly empty.

  Tip: WEAR equipment to boost your attack and defense.
  Type EQUIPMENT to see what you have equipped.
ambient_1: Empty weapon racks creak softly in the still air.
ambient_2: The walls feel cool and rough beneath the fingertips.
ambient_3: A faint metallic scent hangs near the armory's edges.

name: Training Tower  -  Fifth Floor
description:
The air grows warmer. You hear growling from the shadows.

  Tip: Your four core stats  -  Vigor, Precision, Grit, Instinct  -  grow
  through combat. Take hits to build Grit. Land hits to build Precision.
ambient_1: The warmth here presses in like a silent breath.
ambient_2: Low growls echo from unseen shadows nearby.
ambient_3: The air carries a faint tang of iron and sweat.

name: Training Tower  -  Sixth Floor
description:
A rest alcove with a stone bench and a water basin.

  Tip: Type REST to recover HP and Focus between fights.
  Safe rooms (marked with a flag) prevent combat.
ambient_1: The stone bench offers a smooth respite from the cold.
ambient_2: Water ripples quietly in the basin, catching faint light.
ambient_3: The rest alcove feels calm, a pause from the tower’s heat.

name: Training Tower  -  Seventh Floor
description:
Bones litter the floor. The walls are scratched with claw marks.

  Tip: Stronger enemies give more power. Fight things near your level
  for the best growth.
ambient_1: Bones lie scattered across the floor in grim disarray.
ambient_2: Deep claw marks scar the rough stone walls all around.
ambient_3: A musty, heavy scent hangs thickly in the air here.

name: Training Tower  -  Eighth Floor
description:
A narrow corridor with arrow slits in the walls. You feel watched.

  Tip: Some enemies are AGGRESSIVE and attack on sight.
  Others are passive  -  you choose when to fight them.
ambient_1: Narrow arrow slits frame shadowed views beyond the walls.
ambient_2: An uneasy stillness settles, as if unseen eyes watch.
ambient_3: A faint breeze whispers through the corridor’s tight space.

name: Training Tower  -  Ninth Floor
description:
A forge room. An anvil sits cold and unused, but the coals still glow faintly.

  Tip: Visit MERCHANTS to buy and sell gear. Type SHOP near one.
  The Bazaar in the Nexus has merchants.
ambient_1: Cold iron rests on the anvil beneath glowing embers.
ambient_2: The faint warmth of dying coals seeps into the air.
ambient_3: The faint scent of smoke lingers just beyond reach.

name: Training Tower  -  Tenth Floor
description:
The stairwell widens into a dueling ring. Torches blaze on all sides.

  Tip: As you gain power, you'll unlock ABILITIES  -  special attacks
  that cost Focus. Type the ability name to use it in combat.
ambient_1: Torches blaze brightly, casting flickering shadows wide.
ambient_2: The wide dueling ring feels charged with silent tension.
ambient_3: Heat from the flames warms the surrounding stone walls.

name: Training Tower  -  Eleventh Floor
description:
Wind howls through open windows. You can see the Nexus far below.

  Tip: The BULLETIN BOARD in the Nexus offers quests.
  Complete quests to earn Quest Points for the Quest Shop.
ambient_1: Wind howls sharply through open windows overhead.
ambient_2: Far below, the Nexus sprawls in muted colors and light.
ambient_3: The chill air carries a biting sharpness to the skin.

name: Training Tower  -  Twelfth Floor
description:
A library of sorts. Dusty tomes line crumbling shelves.

  Tip: SAY things to NPCs  -  they respond to keywords like
  'hello', 'quest', 'help', 'buy', and 'lore'.
ambient_1: Dusty tomes line shelves crumbling with age and neglect.
ambient_2: The faint smell of old parchment fills the cramped space.
ambient_3: Quiet creaks of settling wood echo softly around.

name: Training Tower  -  Thirteenth Floor
description:
The walls pulse with a faint red glow. Something powerful waits above.

  Tip: RECALL teleports you to your recall point (default: the Nexus).
  Type SET RECALL in a safe room to change it.
ambient_1: A faint red glow pulses softly from the walls.
ambient_2: Dust drifts down from the library below.
ambient_3: The warm hum of power rises from above.
ambient_4: Cool air seeps upward from the floor below.

name: Training Tower  -  Fourteenth Floor
description:
A meditation chamber. Incense burns in brass holders.

  Tip: The world beyond the Nexus is divided into themed zones.
  Each gateway leads to a different genre  -  fantasy, sci-fi, noir, and more.
  Explore them all, but beware: some zones are dangerous for the unprepared.
ambient_1: The scent of burning incense fills the air.
ambient_2: A faint red glow radiates from the floor below.
ambient_3: Soft chanting echoes up from the summit above.
ambient_4: Brass holders gleam dimly in the calm light.

name: Training Tower  -  Summit
description:
You stand at the top of the tower. The entire Nexus spreads below you, its six gateways glowing with different colors. A grizzled instructor leans against the parapet.

  'You've made it to the top. You're ready for the real world now.'
  'Head back down and explore the gateways. Your marble is out there somewhere.'
ambient_1: The entire Nexus spreads out in glowing gateways below.
ambient_2: A faint trace of incense drifts up from the floor below.
ambient_3: Cold wind brushes past the stone parapet.
ambient_4: Distant voices murmur softly from the chamber below.

name: The Quest Shop
description:
A cozy alcove beneath the Bulletin Board. Shelves line every wall, packed with useful gear, rare consumables, and mysterious trinkets  -  all available for Quest Points.

A cheerful shopkeeper stands behind a counter cluttered with oddities.

  Type QUEST SHOP to browse. Type QUEST BUY <number> to purchase.
ambient_1: The scent of aged parchment and herbs drifts softly from nearby shelves.
ambient_2: Faint murmurs rise from above, where countless notices crowd the board.
ambient_3: Warm light spills gently, casting soft shadows on well-worn wooden shelves.
ambient_4: The air carries a faint crispness, touched by the scent of rare spices.

name: Mountain Pass  -  Summit
description: The wind howls at this narrow pass between two peaks. Snow whips horizontally. The path descends south toward greener lands.
ambient_1: The shriek of eagles echoes from the rocky outcrop to the east.
ambient_2: Faint sunlight filters through leaves from the southeast forest clearing.
ambient_3: Mushrooms glow faintly in the darkness beyond the southwest forest.
ambient_4: A golden light pulses from below through the northern gateway arch.

name: Eagle's Nest
description: A rocky outcrop where massive eagles nest. Bones of large animals litter the ground. The view stretches for miles.
ambient_1: Bones lie scattered beneath the watchful eyes of massive eagles.
ambient_2: Sunlight softens the wildflowers carpeting the forest clearing to the south.
ambient_3: Herbs dry quietly near the shallow cave to the southeast.
ambient_4: The rocky summit pass whispers with biting winds from the west.

name: Dark Forest  -  Deep
description: Ancient trees block all sunlight. Mushrooms glow faintly on rotting logs. Something moves in the undergrowth.
ambient_1: Glowing mushrooms cast eerie light on rotting logs nearby.
ambient_2: A gentle stream trickles past the eastern rocky descent.
ambient_3: The narrow summit pass howls with wind from the northeast.
ambient_4: Rolling hills appear faintly beyond the thinning trees to the southwest.

name: Mountain Pass  -  Descent
description: The rocky path winds downward through scrub brush. A stream trickles alongside.
ambient_1: The rocky path winds downward beside a softly trickling stream.
ambient_2: Sunlight breaks through the forest clearing to the east.
ambient_3: Trees shimmer faintly with inner light to the southeast.
ambient_4: Ancient trees block sunlight and muffled sounds come from the west.

name: Forest Clearing
description: A break in the canopy lets sunlight through. Wildflowers carpet the ground. A stone circle stands in the center.
ambient_1: Wildflowers burst in color beneath a break in the canopy.
ambient_2: Massive eagle bones lie scattered on the rocky outcrop to the north.
ambient_3: Pixies dart between shimmering branches in the grove to the south.
ambient_4: The faint sound of a stream drifts from the rocky path to the west.

name: Hermit's Cave
description: A shallow cave with signs of habitation  -  a bedroll, dried herbs, a small fire pit.
ambient_1: Dried herbs hang quietly near a small fire pit.
ambient_2: Wildflowers carpet the clearing just to the west.
ambient_3: The distant echo of eagles cries drifts from the northwest outcrop.
ambient_4: A faint honeyed sweetness floats in from the shimmering grove to the southwest.

name: Dark Forest  -  Western Edge
description: The trees thin here, revealing rolling hills to the west. Claw marks scar the bark.
ambient_1: Trees thin to reveal rolling hills stretching westward.
ambient_2: Claw marks scar the bark of nearby gnarled trunks.
ambient_3: A wooden signpost creaks softly at the crossroads to the east.
ambient_4: Golden wheat fields sway gently beyond the southeast farmstead.

name: Dark Forest  -  Crossroads
description: Two paths cross here. A wooden signpost points in four directions, but the writing has faded.
ambient_1: Faded wooden signs offer cryptic directions under dense canopy.
ambient_2: Wheat fields ripple like waves to the south.
ambient_3: The dirt road hums faintly from the east.
ambient_4: Sheep graze quietly on the rolling hills to the southwest.

name: Forest Road  -  North
description: A dirt road cuts through the forest. Cart tracks suggest regular traffic.
ambient_1: Cart tracks scar the well-traveled dirt road.
ambient_2: The scent of honeyed air drifts in from the shimmering grove to the east.
ambient_3: A large oak tree shades a quiet bench at the road's bend to the southeast.
ambient_4: Wheat fields whisper softly beyond the southwest farmstead.

name: Enchanted Grove
description: The trees here shimmer with inner light. Pixies dart between branches. The air tastes like honey.
ambient_1: Trees shimmer softly with an inner luminescence.
ambient_2: Pixies flit like sparks between glowing branches.
ambient_3: Sunlight filters through the clearing to the north.
ambient_4: The distant broken wheel of a mill creaks faintly to the east.

name: Abandoned Mill
description: A watermill sits beside a dry streambed. The wheel is broken. Grain sacks rot inside.
ambient_1: The broken watermill wheel groans quietly beside the dry streambed.
ambient_2: Faint smoke rises from a small fire pit in the cave to the north.
ambient_3: Wildflowers sway gently in the clearing to the northwest.
ambient_4: The scent of honey lingers from the shimmering grove to the west.

name: Bandit Camp  -  Outskirts
description: Trampled ground and old campfires. Someone has been living here recently.
ambient_1: Trampled earth bears the marks of recent, restless visitors.
ambient_2: Old campfires smolder faintly in the cool air.
ambient_3: The shallow cave to the northwest holds quiet signs of habitation.
ambient_4: A narrow rocky path winds off to the southwest, silent and less traveled.

name: Rolling Hills  -  West
description: Green hills stretch westward under a grey sky. Sheep graze in the distance.
ambient_1: Grey clouds hang low above the endless green hills to the west.
ambient_2: Distant sheep bleat softly under the watching gaze of thinning trees.
ambient_3: Claw marks mar the bark north where forest meets open land.
ambient_4: A faded wooden signpost points from the forest crossroads northeast.

name: Farmstead  -  Fields
description: Wheat fields sway in the breeze. A scarecrow watches with button eyes.
ambient_1: Wheat stalks ripple gently in the breeze from the surrounding fields.
ambient_2: Button-eyed scarecrow stands sentinel beside the rolling western hills.
ambient_3: Faint sounds of guards echo east near the massive stone gatehouse.
ambient_4: Paths meet at the crossroads to the north where faded signs lean.

name: King's Road  -  North Gate
description: The cobblestone road leads to a massive stone gatehouse. Guards in silver tabards check travelers. The trees here are bent outward in a perfect circle, their bark scorched and glassy. At the center, the grass has been burned away to reveal a perfectly smooth crater in the earth.
ambient_1: Scorched trees form a perfect circle, their bark glassy and blackened.
ambient_2: Shattered stones and scattered parchments lie beyond the gate to the north.
ambient_3: Silver-tabarded guards murmur as travelers pass beneath the gatehouse.
ambient_4: Golden light shimmers from the enchanted grove northeast, sweet as honey.

name: King's Road  -  Bend
description: The road curves here around a large oak tree. A bench sits beneath it.
ambient_1: The oak tree’s broad shadow cools the curved road beneath its boughs.
ambient_2: Soft honeyed air drifts south from the glowing trees of the enchanted grove.
ambient_3: A worn bench invites stillness beneath the gentle sway of leaves.
ambient_4: Broken grain sacks rot quietly in the abandoned mill northeast.

name: Eastern Trail
description: A narrow path winds eastward through rocky terrain. It looks less traveled.
ambient_1: Rocky terrain frames the narrow, seldom-used path winding eastward.
ambient_2: The faint clang of metal drifts up from smiths along the nearby streets.
ambient_3: Dry streambed groans quietly beside the watermill to the north.
ambient_4: A warm hearth's smell wafts up from the tavern southwest along the trail.

name: Bandit Camp  -  Center
description: A ring of tents surrounds a large fire pit. Stolen goods are piled carelessly.
ambient_1: Tents circle the fire pit where shadows dance in flickering embers.
ambient_2: Trampled earth and cold ashes mark the outskirts to the north.
ambient_3: Faint bubbling and strange scents rise from the alchemist’s nearby shop.
ambient_4: Plans and maps rustle softly in the larger tent to the east.

name: Bandit Camp  -  Leader's Tent
description: A larger tent with a crude throne made of shields. Maps and plans are pinned to a board.
ambient_1: Crude shields form a throne that creaks beneath the weight of secrets.
ambient_2: Old campfires smolder faintly northwest amid trampled ground.
ambient_3: The distant call of archers echoes softly from the eastern wall below.
ambient_4: Maps pinned to the board whisper of plots and stolen glories.

name: Town Square  -  North
description: The northern edge of the town square. A fountain depicts a knight slaying a dragon.
ambient_1: Stone fountain water laps quietly, shaped like a knight and dragon.
ambient_2: Golden wheat waves gently north where fields stretch beneath grey skies.
ambient_3: Noble houses line the avenue to the east, their windows glinting.
ambient_4: Soft lute music drifts up from the busy market street to the south.

name: Castle Street
description: A wide avenue leading toward the castle. Noble houses line both sides.
ambient_1: Tall noble houses stand silent, their windows watching the wide avenue.
ambient_2: The distant clang of metal forges echoes faintly southeast along the street.
ambient_3: Faint breath of wheat fields drifts in from the northwest farmstead.
ambient_4: Guards patrol the massive gatehouse to the north, voices muted.

name: The Prancing Pony Inn
description: A warm tavern with a roaring fire. The smell of ale and roasting meat fills the air.
ambient_1: Warm firelight flickers behind windows, mingling with smells of roasting meat.
ambient_2: Soft chants float up faintly from the temple southeast beyond the street.
ambient_3: A quiet bench rests beneath a large oak tree to the north along the road.
ambient_4: Noble houses stand tall westward, their shadows pooling on the cobblestones.

name: Alchemist's Shop
description: Bubbling vials and strange smells. The alchemist peers at you through thick spectacles.
ambient_1: Strange, sweet smells mingle with bubbling sounds from scattered vials.
ambient_2: Cold iron gate creaks faintly southeast where the misty graveyard waits.
ambient_3: Distant clang of metal and voices rise softly southwest from the market.
ambient_4: The warm hearth’s smoke drifts through the tavern westward on the breeze.

name: Eastern Wall  -  Tower
description: A guard tower built into the town wall. Archers watch the eastern approach.
ambient_1: Archer’s calls and clinking armor echo faintly above the eastern approach.
ambient_2: Soft chanting whispers up from the white stone temple to the southwest.
ambient_3: Iron gate hangs slightly ajar to the south, creaking in the cold wind.

ambient_1: Salt air whispers in from the docks beyond the tunnel’s end.
ambient_2: Water from the underground river mists in the cool darkness.
ambient_3: Shadows shift where the flooded section pools with cold water.
ambient_4: Dim light filters from the chapel hidden down the southwest path.

name: Catacombs  -  Deep Tombs
description: Older tombs. The inscriptions are in Latin. These are the city's founders.
ambient_1: Latin inscriptions wear smooth from centuries of forgotten touch.
ambient_2: Candles flicker faintly in the ritual chamber to the north.
ambient_3: Warm steam drifts from the Roman bath to the southeast.
ambient_4: A quiet hush speaks of ancient secrets from the mob archive.

name: Catacombs  -  The Vault
description: A sealed chamber. The lock is modern  -  someone added it recently. What's worth protecting down here?
ambient_1: The modern lock stands out against the ancient stone’s chill.
ambient_2: Fresh candle smoke drifts from the ritual chamber to the northwest.
ambient_3: Warmth from the Roman bath below softens the cold stone beneath.
ambient_4: A muted murmur of flowing water drifts from the river to the northeast.

name: Catacombs  -  Forgotten Chapel
description: A tiny underground chapel. Pews for twelve. The crucifix is inverted. Not a good sign.
ambient_1: The inverted crucifix casts a dark silhouette on cold stone walls.
ambient_2: A boat rocks gently on the river just north through the cave.
ambient_3: Warm steam from the Roman bath curls faintly from the southwest.
ambient_4: Bronze door shadows loom silently to the dark south passage.

name: Catacombs  -  Ancient Passage
description: Pre-city tunnels. The stonework is Roman. This city is older than anyone knows.
ambient_1: Roman stone arches curve overhead, worn smooth by time’s hand.
ambient_2: Warm, moist air drifts up from the bathhouse to the east.
ambient_3: A sealed vault stands silent, guarding secrets beyond the northeast.
ambient_4: The founders’ tombs lie quiet just beyond the northern arch.

name: Catacombs  -  Roman Bath
description: An ancient bathhouse, still partially intact. The water is warm from geothermal heat.
ambient_1: Warm geothermal water sends wisps of steam into the cool air.
ambient_2: Ancient stonework from the passage to the west feels solid and cold.
ambient_3: A faint metallic gleam hints at the bronze door just beyond east.
ambient_4: The inverted crucifix of the chapel sends a shadow from the northeast.

name: Catacombs  -  Deepest Point
description: The lowest accessible point. A door of ancient bronze. No keyhole. No handle. Just a face.
ambient_1: The bronze door’s face watches silently, unyielding and solemn.
ambient_2: Warmth from the nearby bathhouse seeps into the chilled air.
ambient_3: A faint scent of incense drifts down from the chapel above.
ambient_4: The locked vault’s presence presses quietly from the northwest.

name: Firebase Alpha  -  Command
description: A reinforced bunker with maps and radios. The CO barks orders. Shells land in the distance.
ambient_1: Maps and radios hum quietly beneath the distant thuds of shells.
ambient_2: Orders echo faintly through the reinforced walls.
ambient_3: The orange firelight from below casts flickering shadows.
ambient_4: A low murmur from the mess hall drifts upward.

name: Firebase Alpha  -  Armory
description: Racks of weapons behind chain-link. The quartermaster logs everything. Everything.
ambient_1: Metal clinks softly behind chain-link fences.
ambient_2: The scent of oil and grease wafts up from the motor pool.
ambient_3: Quiet voices murmur as the quartermaster checks his logs.
ambient_4: A faint breeze carries the hum of rotors from the helipad.

name: Firebase Alpha  -  Barracks
description: Rows of cots. Personal effects tucked under pillows. Letters from home pinned to the walls.
ambient_1: The faint rustle of paper from pinned letters blends with distant orders.
ambient_2: Warmth from the mess hall seeps through the walls.
ambient_3: Through the northeast, the bunker’s radios crackle steadily.
ambient_4: The still air holds a faint trace of laundry detergent.

name: Firebase Alpha  -  Mess Hall
description: Long tables and the smell of reconstituted food. A TV plays news nobody watches.
ambient_1: The stale scent of reconstituted meals lingers heavily here.
ambient_2: A muted television plays forgotten news in the distance.
ambient_3: Faint echoes of voices and clinking utensils drift from the barracks.
ambient_4: A low rumble from the command bunker shakes the air.

name: Firebase Alpha  -  Motor Pool
description: Vehicles in various states of repair. A mechanic curses at an engine. Oil stains everything.
ambient_1: The sharp tang of oil mingles with distant kitchen aromas.
ambient_2: Soft metal groaning and curses rise from a nearby engine.
ambient_3: A faint breeze carries the restless wind from the helipad.
ambient_4: Distant commands come from the command bunker to the northwest.

name: Firebase Alpha  -  Helipad
description: A concrete pad with painted circles. The wind from rotors never fully dies here.
ambient_1: The wind here never stills, carrying a constant mechanical drone.
ambient_2: Concrete circles bear the scuffs of countless rotor blades.
ambient_3: The supply gate’s guarded bustle hums faintly to the southwest.
ambient_4: Binocular lenses gleam briefly in the tower to the south.

name: Perimeter  -  West Tower
description: A guard tower with sandbags and a mounted gun. The view shows nothing but wasteland.
ambient_1: Sandbags sag under relentless wind atop the guard tower.
ambient_2: Only wasteland stretches beyond, silent and unyielding.
ambient_3: The faintest sounds of papers rustling come from the checkpoint east.
ambient_4: Ash crunches underfoot from the nearby burned forest to the south.

name: Perimeter  -  West Gate
description: A checkpoint with concrete barriers. Razor wire tops the walls. Papers are checked twice.
ambient_1: Concrete barriers rise with razor wire glistening in the sun.
ambient_2: Papers shuffle softly as checks are made again and again.
ambient_3: The distant murmur of mess hall voices drifts from the northeast.
ambient_4: Charred tree trunks stand like silent sentinels to the southwest.

name: Perimeter  -  North Wall
description: The main wall facing enemy territory. Bullet holes pockmark the concrete.
ambient_1: Bullet-pocked concrete stands resolute against unseen threats.
ambient_2: The faint smell of reheated food drifts up from the mess hall.
ambient_3: A cold wind carries distant engine growls from the motor pool.
ambient_4: Barbed wire rustles softly as it catches the breeze from the west.

name: Perimeter  -  East Gate
description: The supply gate. Convoys come and go under heavy guard.
ambient_1: Convoys rumble faintly beneath watchful eyes and heavy guard.
ambient_2: The scent of grease and oil rises from the motor pool to the north.
ambient_3: Wind carries faint rotor sounds from the helipad to the northeast.
ambient_4: Warning signs stand weathered beyond the supply gate.

name: Perimeter  -  East Tower
description: Another guard tower. Binoculars scan the horizon. Something moved out there.
ambient_1: Binoculars focus on shifting shadows beyond the horizon.
ambient_2: The mechanical drone of rotors filters up from the helipad above.
ambient_3: A low rustle comes from the supply gate to the west.
ambient_4: Warning signs in multiple languages creak faintly to the south.

name: Wasteland  -  Crater Field
description: Shell craters overlap like a diseased moonscape. Nothing grows here. Nothing should.
ambient_1: Cratered earth sprawls lifeless under a gray, heavy sky.
ambient_2: The faint outline of sandbags and mounted guns are visible northeast.
ambient_3: Charred forest edges the desolation to the east with ash underfoot.
ambient_4: Silent rubble from a ruined village lies just beyond the south.

name: Wasteland  -  Burned Forest
description: Charred tree trunks stand like black fingers. Ash crunches underfoot.
ambient_1: Charred trunks reach skyward like blackened fingers.
ambient_2: Ash shifts softly beneath a dry, cracked wind.
ambient_3: Razor wire glints faintly near concrete barriers.
ambient_4: The distant guard tower watches over empty plains.

name: No Man's Land  -  West
description: The space between the lines. Barbed wire and unexploded ordnance. Every step could be your last.
ambient_1: Barbed wire twists under a gray, heavy sky.
ambient_2: Faint clinks echo around scattered unexploded shells.
ambient_3: Mud seeps between sandbags at a nearby trench junction.
ambient_4: Overhead, the guard tower's silhouette looms large.

name: No Man's Land  -  Center
description: A destroyed tank sits in the middle of the field. Both sides use it as a landmark.
ambient_1: A shell-pocked concrete wall rises to the north.
ambient_2: Mud squelches underfoot near the trench junction to the south.
ambient_3: The wrecked tank's rusted metal smells faintly of oil.
ambient_4: Guarded gates hum with quiet, tense activity.

name: No Man's Land  -  East
description: More wire, more craters. A boot sticks out of the mud. Nobody claims it.
ambient_1: An empty boot juts stiffly from the thick mud.
ambient_2: The faint scent of fear drifts from the nearby bunker.
ambient_3: Bullet-pocked walls stand silent to the north and northwest.
ambient_4: Binocular lenses flash briefly from a distant tower.

name: Wasteland  -  Minefield
description: Warning signs in three languages. Some of the signs have been moved. Deliberately.
ambient_1: Warning signs hang askew, faded by sun and dust.
ambient_2: Radio chatter crackles faintly from the camouflaged post.
ambient_3: The soft thud of distant footsteps echoes through the minefield.
ambient_4: The reinforced bunker smells of damp earth and dread.

name: Wasteland  -  Sniper Alley
description: A long straight road between ruined buildings. Everyone runs here. Not everyone makes it.
ambient_1: Ruined buildings frame a long, unforgiving road.
ambient_2: The quiet hum of radios drifts up from the observation post.
ambient_3: Binoculars scan the horizon from the watchtower above.
ambient_4: Cold wind whistles through broken window frames.

name: Ruined Village  -  West
description: What was once a home. The walls still stand but the roof is gone. Family photos in the rubble.
ambient_1: Rubble cradles faded family photos dusted with ash.
ambient_2: Shell craters scar the barren field to the north.
ambient_3: The faint scent of burnt wood lingers nearby.
ambient_4: A shattered bridge looms over a sickly green river.

name: Ruined Village  -  Center
description: The village square. A fountain with no water. A clock tower with no hands. A massive impact crater dominates the landscape here. Unlike the bomb craters nearby, this one is perfectly spherical, and the ground at its center has been compressed into a mirror-smooth surface.
exits_south: {'target_vnum': 4099, 'locked': True, 'key_vnum': 9812, 'description': 'A locked door blocks the way.'}
ambient_1: The cracked village fountain stands dry and forgotten.
ambient_2: A massive impact crater yawns, perfectly spherical and silent.
ambient_3: Ash drifts softly from charred trees to the north.
ambient_4: The ruined village hums with a heavy, oppressive stillness.

name: Ruined Village  -  East
description: A destroyed school. Tiny desks overturned. Crayon drawings on the remaining wall.
ambient_1: Tiny overturned desks lie beneath crayon-scrawled walls.
ambient_2: Wire fences murmur with restless tension to the north.
ambient_3: Toxic river waters ripple quietly to the south.
ambient_4: A shattered bridge creaks faintly in the distance.

ambient_3: The river's current murmurs softly at the shallow crossing.
ambient_4: Silent footprints mark the path towards enemy lines.

ambient_2: A lone boot protrudes from the mud to the north.
ambient_3: Warning signs flutter faintly in the breeze to the northeast.
ambient_4: The reinforced bunker exhales a scent of stale fear.

ambient_2: The muffled thud of distant gunfire drifts from the minefield.
ambient_3: Binoculars catch brief glints from the nearby sniper alley.
ambient_4: Faint chemical smells linger near the camouflaged post.

ambient_2: The scent of damp earth lingers from the trench to the west.
ambient_3: Steel scars mar the hillside where the enemy bunker stands southwest.
ambient_4: Warning signs flutter faintly from the northwest minefield.

ambient_4: Tents flap weakly in the breeze on the refugee camp outskirts southeast.

ambient_2: Crayon drawings faintly color the broken walls of the school north.
ambient_3: Mud churns thick where trenches meet northeast through the swampy ground.
ambient_4: The scent of cooking fires drifts softly from the refugee tents south.

ambient_2: The distant murmur of voices rises faintly from the refugee camp south.
ambient_3: Cracked earth and worn sandbags frame the junction to the north.
ambient_4: The smell of sweat and fear hangs thick near the enemy base southeast.

ambient_3: A faint clatter echoes from the nearby enemy bunker to the east.

ambient_3: The hillside slopes steeply, shadows stretching toward the observation post northeast.
ambient_4: A faint metallic tang lingers in the air around the enemy base perimeter southwest.

ambient_2: The toxic river gurgles quietly north beneath the broken bridge.
ambient_3: Tents flap lightly in the breeze on the refugee camp outskirts east.
ambient_4: The mountain road switchback looms ominously to the southeast.

ambient_3: The scent of smoke and cooking fires drifts gently from the mountain road below.

ambient_3: Dust rises faintly where the mountain road bends sharply to the southwest.

ambient_3: Faint voices echo from the fortified checkpoint to the east.
ambient_4: Broken highways to the northwest crumble under the mountain’s watch.

ambient_4: Darkness seeps from the cave entrance to the east.

ambient_4: A faint metallic scent wafts from the arsenal below.

ambient_1: Diesel engines hum faintly from the west, a low mechanical drone.
ambient_2: Cold concrete walls give way to rough bedrock beneath the stairs to the south.
ambient_3: Flickering monitors cast pale glows, scrolling endless classified data.
ambient_4: A faint metallic scent lingers, mixed with stale recycled air.

name: Bunker  -  Research Lab
description: Biological containment units. Most are intact. One is broken. The contents are gone.
ambient_1: The faint buzz of radio static drifts from the northeast communications room.
ambient_2: Cold air seeps softly from the freezers to the east, sharp and biting.
ambient_3: Broken containment glass casts fractured shadows across the floor.
ambient_4: Trays of petrified food linger faintly, mixing with sterile chemical smells.

name: Bunker  -  Cold Storage
description: Freezers at -40. Biological samples. Some are labeled. Some are deliberately unlabeled.
ambient_1: The sharp chill of freezers chills the air, frost creeping along surfaces.
ambient_2: Distant radio static hums from the north, occasionally broken by faint music.
ambient_3: Surgical steel gleams faintly from the medical bay just beyond the northeast.
ambient_4: A low metallic creak echoes softly from the broken containment room below.

name: Bunker  -  Escape Tunnel
description: A narrow tunnel with emergency lighting. It leads somewhere outside the base perimeter.
ambient_1: Emergency lights hum quietly, casting long shadows down the narrow tunnel.
ambient_2: Soft echoes of distant radio static mingle with the cold scent from freezers west.
ambient_3: A faint sterile smell drifts from the medical bay ahead, sharp and clinical.
ambient_4: The tunnel walls feel cool and rough under fingertips, worn from disuse.

name: Sub-Level  -  Stairwell
description: Stairs descend further. The walls change from concrete to bedrock. This wasn't in the plans.
ambient_1: Cold bedrock walls replace concrete as the stairs descend into darkness.
ambient_2: Diesel hums faintly from the generator room to the northwest.
ambient_3: The server room above pulses with electronic life, soft beeps and clicks.
ambient_4: A musty scent of old paper drifts up faintly from the archive below.

name: Sub-Level  -  Containment
description: A room designed to hold something. The restraints are massive. They've been broken.
ambient_1: Heavy broken restraints scar the walls, cold and rusted.
ambient_2: A low mechanical hum pulses from the server room to the northwest.
ambient_3: The chill of freezers seeps in from northeast, biting and sharp.
ambient_4: Faint whispers of paper rustling rise from the archive far below.

name: Sub-Level  -  Project Room
description: Files marked 'PROJECT PROMETHEUS.' Whatever they made, it got out.
ambient_1: Files stamped PROJECT PROMETHEUS radiate secrets that chill the air.
ambient_2: Cold air drifts in from the freezers to the north, sharp and clean.
ambient_3: Faint echoes rise from the pit below, a deep and ominous rumble.
ambient_4: Dim emergency lights flicker in the escape tunnel to the northeast.

name: Deep Storage  -  Vault
description: A bank vault door. Inside: crates marked with radiation symbols and 'DO NOT OPEN UNTIL 2099.'
ambient_1: The heavy vault door looms silently, its metal cold and unyielding.
ambient_2: A faint scent of ozone and old paper drifts from the archive to the east.
ambient_3: The stairwell above breathes cold air, the bedrock walls damp and rough.
ambient_4: Radiation warnings hum faintly in the air, unseen but deeply felt.

name: Deep Storage  -  Archive
description: Filing cabinets of classified documents. Decades of secrets. Some pages are redacted entirely.
ambient_1: Rows of filing cabinets stand silent, their secrets sealed tight.
ambient_2: A faint metallic hum rises from the containment room to the north.
ambient_3: Heavy vault doors rest to the west, cold and impenetrable.
ambient_4: A soft draft carries whispers from the pit’s shaft far to the east.

name: The Pit
description: The deepest point. A shaft drilled into the earth. Something is down there. Something is coming up.
ambient_1: The shaft descends into darkness, a void that seems to breathe.
ambient_2: Low rumbles echo from below, stirring dust and dread alike.
ambient_3: Faint light flickers from containment restraints to the northwest.
ambient_4: The stale scent of earth and rust hangs heavy in the heavy silence.

name: The Apex
description: The highest point reachable. Stars surround you in every direction. A single crystal floats here, pulsing with light.
ambient_1: A solitary crystal pulses gently, casting soft light on endless stars.
ambient_2: A faint hum drifts in from the musical orbits of the Star Garden to the east.
ambient_3: Below, the Gateway Chamber opens onto floating islands veiled in mist.

name: Star Garden
description: Miniature stars orbit a central point like a mobile. Each one hums a different note.
ambient_1: Miniature stars orbit like a mobile, each resonating with a unique tone.
ambient_2: To the west, the Apex glows with a single crystal pulsing in rhythm.
ambient_3: A subtle crackle from the Observatory Shard drifts in from the southwest.

name: Crystal Shard  -  North
description: A floating platform of pure crystal. It rings like a bell when you step on it. The void stretches below.
ambient_1: The platform rings softly, its crystal surface cool underfoot.
ambient_2: The void stretches endlessly below, swallowing distant light.
ambient_3: From the northeast, a pulsing crystal casts a faint, steady glow.

name: The Observatory Shard
description: A shard with a massive telescope pointed at something specific. The lens is cracked but still functional.
ambient_1: The cracked telescope lens reflects distant stars in fractured patterns.
ambient_2: A deep resonance from the nearby Star Garden hums in harmonic waves.
ambient_3: Cool drafts carry faint scents of unknown flora from the Garden Shard.

name: Library Shard
description: Books float in zero gravity around a reading chair. Knowledge from dead worlds preserved in amber light.
ambient_1: Books float in quiet orbit, their pages faintly glowing with amber light.
ambient_2: A soft harmonic vibration filters in from crystalline pillars to the east.
ambient_3: The gentle hum of miniature stars drifts in from the north.

name: The Singing Stones
description: Tall crystalline pillars that vibrate with harmonic frequencies. Standing between them is transcendent.
ambient_1: Tall crystalline pillars pulse with vibrating harmonics that resonate deeply.
ambient_2: Nearby stars shimmer softly, their notes weaving through the still air.
ambient_3: The scent of ancient pages drifts faintly from the floating books westward.

name: Vine Bridge  -  West
description: A bridge of living vines spans the void between shards. It sways gently. Don't look down.
ambient_1: Living vines sway gently, their surface cool and slightly damp to the touch.
ambient_2: Below, the void yawns black and silent, endless and deep.
ambient_3: The distant roar of waterfall water drifts softly from the south.

name: Garden Shard  -  North
description: An impossible garden floating in space. Flowers that shouldn't exist bloom in colors with no name. Space itself seems to bend here. Light curves in impossible arcs around an invisible point, and the stars behind it are distorted into concentric rings  -  the gravitational echo of something that passed through recently.
ambient_1: Colors shift in impossible blooms, glowing softly beneath curved light arcs.
ambient_2: The delicate scent of upside-down trees drifts faintly from the east.
ambient_3: A cool mist rises where water cascades off the shard to the southwest.

name: Central Nexus Shard
description: The largest shard  -  a floating island the size of a city block. Paths radiate outward in every direction.
ambient_1: Paths stretch outward underfoot, lined with polished stone and cool shadows.
ambient_2: Mechanical gears tick faintly from the southeast, counting endless moments.
ambient_3: The hum of distant stars and ringing crystal platforms blend softly nearby.

name: Garden Shard  -  East
description: More impossible flora. A tree grows upside down, its roots reaching for stars instead of soil.
ambient_1: Roots stretch skyward, inverted branches brushing softly against cool starlight.
ambient_2: From the north, floating books glow with quiet, amber knowledge.
ambient_3: A distant chorus of harmonic stones hums faintly from the northeast.

name: Vine Bridge  -  East
description: Another living bridge. This one has thorns. They retract as you approach. Mostly.
ambient_1: Thorns retract with slow inevitability as the bridge pulses alive beneath.
ambient_2: A mirrored surface shimmers to the south, reflecting with a delayed echo.
ambient_3: The vibrating crystalline pillars hum a deep, resonant chord from the north.

name: Isolated Shard  -  Far West
description: A tiny shard barely large enough to stand on. The view is vertigo-inducing and beautiful.
ambient_1: The vast emptiness below swallows sound, leaving a profound, serene silence.
ambient_2: A gentle sway carries the scent of luminescent mushrooms drifting upward.
ambient_3: Stars stretch endlessly in every direction, cold and distant.

name: Waterfall Shard
description: Water falls from nowhere, pools briefly on this shard, then cascades off the edge into nothing.
ambient_1: Water cascades over the edge into endless void below.
ambient_2: The vine bridge to the north sways with a gentle creak.
ambient_3: Luminescent mushroom spores drift upward from the south.
ambient_4: Faint echoes of distant trades float in from the east.

name: Marketplace Shard
description: Beings from different realities trade here. Currency is abstract  -  memories, emotions, time.
ambient_1: The scent of memories and time lingers in the air.
ambient_2: Impossible flowers bloom quietly in the garden to the north.
ambient_3: Mushroom spores float softly from the southwest.
ambient_4: Small void-crystal homes hum faintly to the south.

name: The Great Bridge
description: A massive stone bridge connecting the central shard to the southern archipelago. Statues line its rails.
ambient_1: Stone statues gaze silently along the bridge rails.
ambient_2: Impossible flora reach skyward from gardens to the north.
ambient_3: The distant aroma of otherworldly cooking drifts up from the southeast.
ambient_4: Crystal seats curve gently below, waiting for unseen audiences.

name: Clockwork Shard
description: A shard made entirely of gears and mechanisms. They turn endlessly, measuring something.
ambient_1: Endless gears turn with a soft, precise rhythm.
ambient_2: Upside-down roots reach for stars in the garden to the north.
ambient_3: Sparks rise like fireflies from the forge to the southeast.
ambient_4: Thorned vines nearby twitch and retract quietly.

name: Mirror Shard
description: The surface is perfectly reflective. Your reflection moves a half-second behind you.
ambient_1: Reflections ripple like delayed shadows on the mirror surface.
ambient_2: Thorned vine bridge pulses faintly to the north.
ambient_3: Sparks drift upward from the forge just south.
ambient_4: The crumbling shard to the east releases slow dust motes.

name: Broken Shard  -  Edge
description: A shard that's crumbling. Pieces drift away slowly. It won't last much longer.
ambient_1: Fragments slowly drift away into endless dark.
ambient_2: Thorned vines hesitate nearby to the northwest.
ambient_3: A blacksmith's upward sparks flicker to the southwest.
ambient_4: Tunnels yawn darkly in the unstable shard to the south.

name: The Void  -  West Pocket
description: A bubble of breathable air in the void. Nothing else. Just you and the stars.
ambient_1: Stars glitter sharply against the endless black.
ambient_2: A tiny shard above offers a dizzying, beautiful view.
ambient_3: Soft mushroom spores float in from the east.
ambient_4: Gravity pulls faintly from the dense core below.

name: Mushroom Shard
description: Giant luminescent mushrooms grow from this shard. Their spores drift upward like reverse snow.
exits_west: {'target_vnum': 5099, 'locked': True, 'key_vnum': 9813, 'description': 'A locked door blocks the way.'}
ambient_1: Giant mushrooms glow softly, shedding drifting spores.
ambient_2: Water splashes faintly from the shard to the north.
ambient_3: A spiral crystal staircase descends nearby to the southeast.
ambient_4: The air shimmers with raw astral power from the west.

name: Residential Shard  -  West
description: Small dwellings built from void-crystal. Beings who chose to live between worlds.
ambient_1: Void-crystal homes glisten faintly under distant light.
ambient_2: Memories and emotions hum softly from the marketplace to the north.
ambient_3: Luminescent spores drift in from the west.
ambient_4: The spiral descent glows red, fading light below.

name: The Amphitheater
description: A natural bowl in a large shard. Seats carved from crystal. Performances happen when reality allows.
ambient_1: Crystal seats curve silently in the natural bowl.
ambient_2: Stone statues stand guard along the bridge to the north.
ambient_3: Red light rises faintly from the descent below.
ambient_4: The scent of abstract trade lingers softly nearby.

name: Residential Shard  -  East
description: More dwellings. A communal kitchen. The smell of cooking that defies physics.
ambient_1: Warm aromas of impossible cooking drift through the air.
ambient_2: Gears turn steadily to the north, counting unseen things.
ambient_3: Sparks rise from the forge to the east.
ambient_4: The red glow deep below pulses with growing heat.

name: Forge Shard
description: A blacksmith works void-metal on an anvil of compressed starlight. Sparks fall upward.
ambient_1: Sparks ascend like glowing embers into the void.
ambient_2: Your reflection lags on the mirrored surface to the north.
ambient_3: The shattered shard to the east groans with instability.
ambient_4: A low heat rises from the descent below.

name: Broken Shard  -  Interior
description: The inside of the crumbling shard. Tunnels riddle it like worm-eaten wood. Unstable.
ambient_1: Sparks drift upward from the blacksmith's anvil to the west.
ambient_2: Reflections lag behind movements in the northwest shard's mirrored surface.
ambient_3: Heavy gravity hums faintly from the compressed core below to the southwest.
ambient_4: Fragments of the crumbling edge float slowly northward.

name: Gravity Well  -  Edge
description: Gravity gets stronger here. A collapsed shard forms a dense core that pulls things inward.
ambient_1: Mushroom spores drift upward like reverse snow to the north.
ambient_2: Sound is muted and muffled in the dark shard to the south.
ambient_3: A spiral staircase carved from crystal descends to the east.
ambient_4: Small dwellings shimmer faintly northeast, their edges glowing softly.

name: The Descent  -  Upper
description: A spiral staircase carved from a single crystal descends into deeper void.
ambient_1: Luminescent mushrooms pulse faintly from the northwest.
ambient_2: The muffled shadows of the dark shard rise in silhouette to the southwest.
ambient_3: Heat from molten rock drifts faintly from the southeast.
ambient_4: Crystal seats curve softly in the amphitheater to the northeast.

name: The Descent  -  Mid
description: Halfway down the spiral. The light from above is fading. New light glows from below  -  red.
ambient_1: A red glow rises steadily from below to the south and east.
ambient_2: The scent of impossible cooking drifts faintly from the northeast.
ambient_3: Bioluminescent creatures flicker softly in the dark caves to the southwest.
ambient_4: Crystal seats curve gently in the amphitheater just north.

name: The Descent  -  Lower
description: Near the bottom. The red glow is stronger. Heat rises. Something burns below.
ambient_1: A communal kitchen's smell of strange cooking hangs to the north.
ambient_2: The phoenix's eternal flame burns fiercely to the south.
ambient_3: Blacksmith sparks sparkle faintly to the northeast.
ambient_4: The icy cold presses in from the southeast.

name: Gravity Well  -  Core
description: The collapsed shard's core. Gravity is twice normal. Movement is exhausting. Treasures are compressed here.
ambient_1: Heavy gravity weighs down from all around, making each step slow.
ambient_2: Frozen creatures loom within icy walls to the southeast.
ambient_3: The distant heat of molten rock rises from the southwest.
ambient_4: Blacksmith sparks drift upward from the forge just north.

name: Dark Shard  -  Surface
description: A shard that absorbs light. Everything is visible only in silhouette. Sound is muffled.
ambient_1: Shadows shift slowly, swallowed by the dark shard's light absorption.
ambient_2: Sound is muffled, as if underwater, beneath the heavy gravity to the north.
ambient_3: Bioluminescent glimmers tease from tunnels to the east.
ambient_4: Fragments of shattered shards drift silently to the southeast.

name: Dark Shard  -  Caves
description: Tunnels within the dark shard. Bioluminescent creatures provide the only light.
ambient_1: Soft bioluminescent glows pulse gently around the cavern walls.
ambient_2: Muffled quiet from the dark shard surface seeps in from the west.
ambient_3: A deep chain disappears into darkness far below to the southeast.
ambient_4: Gravity hums faintly from the collapsed core to the northwest.

name: The Furnace Shard
description: A shard of molten rock. Lava flows in channels. The heat is barely survivable.
ambient_1: Molten channels hiss and bubble, radiating searing heat.
ambient_2: The red glow of the descent below fades gently to the north.
ambient_3: Voices echo faintly from nowhere in the whispering void to the southeast.
ambient_4: Dark bioluminescent lights flicker softly from the caves to the west.

name: The Furnace  -  Core
description: The heart of the burning shard. A phoenix nests here in eternal flame.
ambient_1: An eternal flame flickers with a heat that never wanes.
ambient_2: Cold presses in from the ice shard to the east, biting and sharp.
ambient_3: Faint echoes of voices drift from the whispering void to the south.
ambient_4: The red glow pulses steadily from the spiral descent to the northwest.

name: Ice Shard  -  Surface
description: A shard of pure ice. The cold is absolute. Your breath freezes before it leaves your lips.
ambient_1: Breath freezes instantly in the absolute cold around.
ambient_2: Heat from the burning shard to the west hums faintly beneath the frost.
ambient_3: Frozen silence holds sway, broken only by distant echoes from the whispering void southwest.
ambient_4: A burning red light glows softly from the nearby descent below to the northwest.

name: Ice Shard  -  Caverns
description: Inside the ice shard. Frozen creatures are visible within the walls. Some look recent.
ambient_1: Frozen figures are trapped within the thick ice walls.
ambient_2: A heavy gravity pulse vibrates faintly from the core to the northwest.
ambient_3: Time feels uncertain as moments overlap to the southwest.
ambient_4: The biting cold of the ice shard surface presses just west.

name: The Graveyard of Shards
description: Fragments of destroyed shards drift here. A memorial to worlds that ended.
ambient_1: Bioluminescent glimmers flicker faintly from tunnels above.
ambient_2: A massive chain plunges into darkness to the east.
ambient_3: Heat from molten rock drifts faintly from the northeast.
ambient_4: The void below pulses with vast, unseen movements.

name: The Anchor Point
description: A massive chain extends downward into absolute darkness. Something is tethered below.
ambient_1: A massive chain extends downward into endless darkness.
ambient_2: The faint roar of lava channels drifts from the north.
ambient_3: Whispers echo softly from the void to the east.
ambient_4: Something warm and breathing lies hidden beneath.

name: The Whispering Void
description: Voices echo here from nowhere. Fragments of conversations from other realities bleed through.
ambient_1: Fragments of distant conversations drift in the still air.
ambient_2: Heat from eternal flames ripples up from the north.
ambient_3: Cold, biting air creeps from icy surfaces nearby.
ambient_4: The abyss below exhales with a soft, organic pulse.

name: Temporal Shard
description: Time moves differently here. You can see yourself arriving and leaving simultaneously.
ambient_1: Frost clings to surfaces in the cold shard above.
ambient_2: Whispers unravel and entwine in the air to the west.
ambient_3: The living floor beneath breathes a slow, steady rhythm.
ambient_4: Eyes blink slowly from the darkness below.

name: The Abyss  -  Edge
description: The void gets darker here. Stars are fewer. Something vast moves in the darkness below.
ambient_1: The void deepens, swallowing faint stars to the south.
ambient_2: Shards drift silently like ghosts from the north.
ambient_3: A massive chain disappears into the abyss, tethering the unknown.
ambient_4: The faint tremor of something vast moves beneath.

name: The Abyss  -  Descent
description: Falling  -  or is it flying? Direction loses meaning. The darkness is absolute.
ambient_1: Direction loses meaning in the endless blackness around.
ambient_2: Chains rattle softly somewhere above the darkness.
ambient_3: Fragments of shattered shards glow faintly nearby.
ambient_4: Whispers echo from distant shards to the northeast.

name: The Abyss  -  Floor
description: There is a bottom. It's soft, organic, warm. It breathes. You're standing on something alive.
ambient_1: The soft ground pulses gently beneath like a living heart.
ambient_2: Voices hum faintly, echoing from the void nearby.
ambient_3: Time itself seems to ripple and fold in the distance.
ambient_4: Heat from molten rock touches the air faintly to the northwest.

name: The Dreaming Shard
description: A shard where reality is shaped by thought. The landscape shifts with your emotions.
ambient_1: The landscape shifts subtly, mirroring distant thoughts.
ambient_2: Darkness deepens to the north and west like an endless breath.
ambient_3: Warmth from the living floor rises softly nearby.
ambient_4: Cracks in reality shimmer faintly from the south.

name: The Forgotten Shard
description: A shard that everyone forgets the moment they leave. Notes are pinned everywhere: 'REMEMBER THIS PLACE.'
ambient_1: Notes flutter softly, their messages lost to memory.
ambient_2: A warm, breathing surface lies just to the north.
ambient_3: Thoughts and emotions warp the shifting terrain to the east.
ambient_4: Darkness swallows stars faintly from the northwest.

name: The Origin Point
description: Where the first shard broke from the original world. Cracks in reality radiate outward from a single point.
ambient_1: Cracks radiate outward, pulsing with primal energy.
ambient_2: The dream-shaped landscape bends and shifts to the south.
ambient_3: Forgotten notes whisper faintly from nearby shards.

name: Astral Sanctum
description: A pocket of concentrated astral energy. The air shimmers with raw power.
ambient_1: A faint hum vibrates through the shimmering air.
ambient_2: Soft spores drift in from the glowing fungi to the east.
ambient_3: The temperature pulses subtly, as if breathing with energy.

name: Deep Void  -  Entry
description: Below the abyss floor. The living thing you stood on has an underside. It's covered in eyes.
ambient_1: Countless eyes blink slowly from the living underside.
ambient_2: Bioluminescent tendrils pulse faintly in the darkness eastward.
ambient_3: Dreams and nightmares ripple softly in nearby pockets.
ambient_4: Time flows oddly above, folding in on itself.

name: Deep Void  -  Tendril Path
description: Organic tendrils form a path through absolute darkness. They pulse with bioluminescence.
ambient_1: Glowing tendrils weave a path through the endless dark.
ambient_2: Fear pulses thickly from nightmares to the south.
ambient_3: Dreams ripple softly on the southwest breeze.
ambient_4: Time flows backward in distant pockets to the southeast.

name: Void Pocket  -  Memories
description: A bubble of reality containing someone's memories. You can walk through their life.
ambient_1: Faint echoes drift up from the bubbling proto-universes below.
ambient_2: A distant shimmer radiates from the skull continent to the southeast.
ambient_3: The endless dream-stuff swirls quietly to the east like a waking mist.
ambient_4: Countless eyes blink slowly beneath the surface to the northeast.

name: Void Pocket  -  Dreams
description: A bubble of pure dream-stuff. Reality is whatever you imagine. Dangerous.
ambient_1: The pulse of bioluminescent tendrils paints the darkness northeast.
ambient_2: Heavy silence presses in from the dead god's vast skull to the south.
ambient_3: Whispers of memories float faintly on the wind from the west.
ambient_4: Cold, nascent realities bubble softly from the womb below and southwest.

name: Void Pocket  -  Nightmares
description: A bubble of concentrated fear. Your worst memories given form. Face them or flee.
ambient_1: Bioluminescent tendrils pulse faintly in the dark to the north.
ambient_2: The mountain-sized hand looms silently to the southeast, motionless and immense.
ambient_3: A distant heartbeat thrums low from the hidden heart far below.
ambient_4: The skull continent spreads wide beneath, heavy with forgotten power.

name: Void Pocket  -  Time
description: A bubble where time flows backward. You see the end before the beginning.
ambient_1: The slow pulse of a distant heart beats faintly to the southwest.
ambient_2: Dark tendrils glow softly through the thick void to the northwest.
ambient_3: The mountain hand’s massive fingers curl silently just to the south.
ambient_4: A swirl of fear seeps in from the nightmare realm to the west.

name: The Womb of Worlds
description: Where new realities gestate. Proto-universes bubble and pop. Some survive.
ambient_1: Soft pops and bubbles rise from the proto-universes all around.
ambient_2: The skull continent looms east, vast and silent beneath the womb.
ambient_3: A faint radiant point glows steadily far to the southeast.
ambient_4: Dreams swirl quietly nearby, their edges flickering and soft.

name: The Dead God's Corpse  -  Head
description: You're standing on something that was once divine. Its skull is a continent.
ambient_1: The first photon burns steady, a small star to the south.
ambient_2: Echoes of ancient thoughts whisper faintly from the southeast.
ambient_3: The living tendril path pulses dimly far to the northeast.
ambient_4: Memories flicker at the edges, shimmering to the northwest and west.

name: The Dead God's Corpse  -  Heart
description: The heart still beats. Once per century. The next beat is soon.
ambient_1: A slow, deep heartbeat reverberates through the vast stillness.
ambient_2: Shadows of nightmares coil quietly from the north.
ambient_3: The mountain hand rests heavy to the east, still and waiting.
ambient_4: A distant glowing seed pulses faintly to the southeast.

name: The Dead God's Corpse  -  Hand
description: A hand the size of a mountain, fingers curled. Something is clutched in the fist.
ambient_1: The curled fingers cradle secrets that hum softly in the dark.
ambient_2: Time’s strange reversal churns quietly just to the north.
ambient_3: Echoes of distant thoughts drift softly southwest, heavy and slow.
ambient_4: Fear clings faintly from the nightmares hanging to the northwest.

name: Primordial Ocean
description: An ocean of liquid potential. Before matter, before energy, there was this.
ambient_1: Liquid potential ripples endlessly in all directions.
ambient_2: The first light glows faintly eastward, steady against the void.
ambient_3: A vast skull rises faintly to the northeast, ancient and immense.
ambient_4: Beyond the horizon, the edge of everything waits silently.

name: The First Light
description: A single point of light in infinite darkness. The first photon ever created. Still shining.
ambient_1: The first photon burns unwavering in the infinite dark.
ambient_2: Gentle bubbles rise from the ocean to the west, cold and deep.
ambient_3: Eternal questions echo faintly from the east.
ambient_4: A steady heartbeat pulses softly from the northeast.

name: The Last Thought
description: The final thought of the dead god. It echoes eternally. It sounds like a question.
ambient_1: A faint question hangs endlessly in the thick still air.
ambient_2: The heartbeat below beats slow and sure to the north.
ambient_3: A glowing seed rests quietly just to the east.
ambient_4: The skull continent looms heavy and silent far to the northwest.

name: The Seed
description: A seed of pure creation. Plant it anywhere and a new world grows. Handle with care.
ambient_1: The seed hums with raw potential, waiting to awaken worlds.
ambient_2: A massive hand curls silently just to the north.
ambient_3: The final thought drifts softly on the wind to the west.
ambient_4: Shimmering reflections ripple quietly in the mirror far below.

name: The Edge of Everything
description: Beyond this, nothing exists. Not void. Not darkness. Not even the concept of 'beyond.'
ambient_1: The faint glow of the First Light pulses steadily to the north.
ambient_2: Ripples shift endlessly across the Primordial Ocean to the northwest.
ambient_3: Shapes flicker in the Mirror of Worlds to the east, watching silently.
ambient_4: A distant echo of a question drifts from the northeast, haunting and soft.

name: The Mirror of Worlds
description: A surface that shows other realities. Some are similar. Some are horrifying. One is watching back.
ambient_1: Visions shimmer across the mirror's surface, glimpses of impossible realms.
ambient_2: The Last Thought murmurs above, a restless echo of finality.
ambient_3: The First Light glows faintly behind, a lone beacon in endless dark.
ambient_4: A small seed of pure creation waits quietly to the northeast.

name: Temporal Nexus  -  Hub
