ambient_2: Soft breezes carry the scent of perfect flowers from the north.
ambient_3: The distant clang of spectral sparring rises faintly to the east.
ambient_4: Silent statues watch over the fields from a hilltop northeast.

name: Training Grounds of the Dead
description: Spirits of warriors spar endlessly. Death has not dulled their skills. If anything, they've improved.
ambient_1: The sharp clang of sparring spirits rings out amid endless practice.
ambient_2: Peaceful green hills roll softly just beyond the western edge.
ambient_3: A strange stillness lingers near the empty hourglass to the east.
ambient_4: The impossible garden's calm hum rises faintly from the northwest.

name: Hall of the Hourglass
description: An enormous hourglass stands in the center of the room, completely empty. Time moves strangely here  -  your shadow arrives before you do.
ambient_1: The hushed clink of distant scales echoes faintly from the north.
ambient_2: A cold mist drifts up from the swirling silver light below to the southwest.
ambient_3: Faint whispers of restless warriors float in from the west.
ambient_4: A gray stillness seeps in from the endless expanse to the east.

name: Limbo  -  Grey Expanse
description: An endless grey plain. Nothing happens here. Nothing ever will. The ultimate punishment: boredom.
ambient_1: An endless gray plain stretches far beneath a muted sky.
ambient_2: A faint heat rises from a black iron gate somewhere to the east.
ambient_3: A vast courtroom's silent judgment hangs heavily to the northwest.
ambient_4: The distant spiral of dark stairs echoes quietly to the northeast.

name: Hell's Gate
description: A gate of black iron radiating heat. Screams from beyond. A demon bouncer checks the list.
ambient_1: Wails and screams echo from the dark descent to the north.
ambient_2: A searing heat rises from the black iron gate beneath the feet.
ambient_3: Bleak grey stretches endlessly to the west, silent and empty.
ambient_4: A faint murmur of restless waiting drifts from the northwest.

name: The Reincarnation Pool
description: A pool of swirling silver light. Souls step in and emerge as something new. Somewhere new.
ambient_1: Silver light swirls softly where souls shift and transform.
ambient_2: Faint clashing of spectral blades comes from the northern grounds.
ambient_3: A salty breeze drifts up from the grey sands of the forgotten shore.
ambient_4: Golden light spills gently from the rolling hills to the northwest.

name: Snake Way  -  Start
description: A narrow winding path above clouds. One misstep and you fall to the realm below. It stretches for miles.
ambient_1: Clouds stretch endlessly below the narrow, winding path.
ambient_2: The sand and salt air of the forgotten shore waft faintly to the southwest.
ambient_3: A strange stillness surrounds the empty hourglass to the north.
ambient_4: The distant echo of clashing blades drifts softly from the northwest.

name: Snake Way  -  Middle
description: The path continues endlessly. Your legs burn. The end is not visible. Keep going.
ambient_1: The burning path stretches endlessly, legs ache with every step.
ambient_2: Grey emptiness to the north swallows all sound and hope.
ambient_3: Black iron heat and distant screams burn faintly from the northeast.
ambient_4: Time seems to bend strangely near the hourglass to the northwest.

name: Snake Way  -  End
description: Finally. The path widens to a small planet floating in the void. A tiny house sits on top.
ambient_1: The tiny planet floats silently in the void, calm and strange.
ambient_2: Heat from the black iron gate carries faintly on the northern wind.
ambient_3: Endless grey stretches quietly to the northwest, empty as always.
ambient_4: The path behind stretches endlessly, legs still burning with effort.

name: The Forgotten Shore
description: A beach of grey sand beside a grey sea. Souls who were forgotten by the living wash up here.
ambient_1: Cool grey sands sift softly beside the quiet, grey sea.
ambient_2: A faint silver glow shimmers from the pool to the north.
ambient_3: Warmth and small life drift gently from the tiny planet to the east.
ambient_4: The final gate looms silently, heavy with unseen endings.

name: King Kai's Planet
description: A tiny planet with its own gravity. A small house, a car, and a monkey. The master trains only the worthy.
ambient_1: The small planet hums softly with unseen gravity and quiet life.
ambient_2: The narrow winding path above clouds stretches and twists to the north.
ambient_3: The salty breeze from the forgotten shore drifts in from the west.
ambient_4: A quiet stillness hangs where nothing exists, just beyond the east.

name: The Void Between
description: The space between life and death. Nothing exists here. Not even nothing. It's less than nothing.
ambient_1: An oppressive emptiness weighs the air, less than nothing itself.
ambient_2: The burning path winds endlessly just a step to the north.
ambient_3: Faint sounds of life and training drift softly from the tiny planet westward.
ambient_4: The tiny planet floats silently nearby, a small house perched atop.

name: The Final Gate
description: Beyond this, even spirits cannot return. Whatever lies past is truly the end. Or the beginning.
ambient_1: A heavy silence presses here, the final boundary of all things.
ambient_2: Grey sands and cold seas whisper faintly from the southwest.
ambient_3: The faint hum of gravity and training drifts from the small planet below.
ambient_4: The void beyond breathes softly, unknown and unreturnable.

name: Zone 1 Area
ambient_1: A faint scent of damp earth lingers in the still air.
ambient_2: Soft drafts carry distant echoes of rustling leaves.
ambient_3: The air feels cool and slightly moist against the skin.

name: The Threshold of Endings
description: Beyond the gate, reality thins to gossamer. The ground beneath you is not ground  -  it is memory, compressed and crystallized. Every step forward echoes with the weight of your journey. Ahead, the world fractures into possibility.

name: The Cracked Obelisk
description: A massive obelisk stands fractured and dark. Cracks run through it like veins. It once held reality together in this place.
ambient_1: Deep cracks mar the obelisk’s surface, shadowed and cold to touch.
ambient_2: A faint scent of ancient stone and dust lingers in the still air.
ambient_3: The fractured obelisk looms silent, as if holding back unseen weight.

name: Chamber of Revelations
description: A pristine white room. In the center, a pedestal holds a fragment of something familiar  -  round, smooth, impossibly dense. A marble fragment.
ambient_1: The marble fragment glows faintly, cold and impossibly smooth.
ambient_2: A cool stillness fills the room, untouched by time or breath.
ambient_3: Soft echoes drift down from the glowing door beyond the out exit.

name: The Final Gate
description: A door of pure light. Etched in the frame: 'WHAT DO ALL SEEKERS PURSUE?' The answer that resonates is 'truth'.
ambient_1: The air hums softly with the pure light radiating from the gate.
ambient_2: A faint warmth pulses from the glowing frame around the door.
ambient_3: Silent whispers seem woven into the light, echoing distant truths.

name: Zone 1 Area
ambient_1: A faint scent of damp earth lingers in the still air.
ambient_2: Soft echoes of distant dripping water resonate quietly.
ambient_3: The ground beneath feels cool and slightly uneven.
ambient_4: A subtle chill brushes gently against any exposed skin.

name: The Space Between
description: You float in a space that defies description. Not darkness, not light  -  absence. The void has texture here, like static between radio stations. Something pulls you forward, gentle but insistent. The marble's trail ends here  -  or begins.
exits_down: {'target_vnum': 11099, 'locked': True, 'key_vnum': None, 'description': 'The pull intensifies downward. You sense the marble below  -  impossibly close, impossibly far. Only those who have gathered every fragment can descend.'}

name: Edge of the Void
description: Beyond this point, there is nothing. Not darkness  -  nothing. The void stretches in every direction without end.
exits_down: {'target_vnum': 11099, 'locked': True, 'key_vnum': None, 'description': 'The void stretches below, but you sense nothing to anchor to. Perhaps if you had followed every trace of the marble...'}
ambient_1: Below, the marble pulses softly with impossible quiet.
ambient_2: Air thins here, touched by absence rather than cold.
ambient_3: The void stretches endlessly, a silent breath without form.

name: The Heart of Everything
description: You stand in a space that is not a space. The marble floats before you  -  impossibly small, impossibly dense, impossibly aware. It has been waiting. Not for you specifically, but for anyone persistent enough to follow its trail across eleven zones, through locked doors and hidden passages, past puzzles and guardians. It pulses once. The pulse says: 'You found me.' The world holds its breath.
ambient_1: The weight of the marble presses softly against the senses.
ambient_2: A hum of awareness vibrates through the stillness here.
ambient_3: No light bends around the dense sphere hanging nearby.
